heading: FARM CREDIT ADMINISTRATION
label: 7 FARM CREDIT ADMINISTRATION
notes: CodificationThe bulk of this chapter was repealed by .26(a), , , which completely rewrote the farm credit laws and represented a fundamental reworking of the statutory basis for the farm credit system. The farm credit system is covered in chapter 23 (§ 2001 et seq.) of this title. See notes set out under .Pub. L. 92–181, § 585 Stat. 625section 2001 of this titleDec. 10, 1971
